user_query: I want to create a personalized playlist for my workout sessions. Can you suggest some energetic songs? Also, fetch the track information for a specific song and provide me with the details about the artist. Additionally, I would like to know the top tracks of this artist using the Shazam API.

TaskList.description: Suggest energetic songs for workout sessions.
Fetch the track information for a specific song to provide details about the artist.
Retrieve the top tracks of the specified artist using the Shazam API.
